name: WeCom (企业微信) — full corp app
description: Tencent WeCom (Enterprise WeChat) corporate app integration. Outbound via /cgi-bin/message/send with corp_id + agent_id + secret credential triple and 2-hour access_token rotation. Distinct from the existing 'wecom-callback' plugin (Group Chat Bot webhook). Set WECOM_CORP_ID, WECOM_AGENT_ID, WECOM_SECRET. Inbound via the corp app's encrypted callback (WXBizMsgCrypt AES-256-CBC) — encrypted callback is a follow-up; this PR ships outbound + plain-text inbound primitives.
